name: Main Reception
description: The main welcome and information desk for visitors, students, and staff. Reception helps with directions, appointments, visitor passes, and general campus queries.
directions: Enter through the main entrance on the ground floor. Reception is directly ahead.

name: Main Gate
description: Main entry and exit point of the university campus.
directions: The main gate is at the front of the campus before the security cabin and reception.

name: Security Cabin
description: Security checkpoint for visitor entry, ID verification, lost and found, and emergency reporting.
map_reference: Ground Floor, Main Entrance, Zone A
directions: The security cabin is just inside the main gate, before reception.

name: Administrative Office
description: Handles admissions, certificates, bonafide letters, student records, forms, and general college administration.
map_reference: Ground Floor, Admin Block, Zone ADM
directions: From reception, turn left and enter the admin block. The Administrative Office is the first large office on the right.

name: Accounts Office
description: Office for fee payments, receipts, scholarship payment queries, and financial documentation.
map_reference: Ground Floor, Admin Block, Zone ADM
directions: Go to the admin block from reception. The Accounts Office is beside the Administrative Office.

name: Examination Cell
description: Handles exam forms, admit cards, hall tickets, timetables, marksheets, revaluation, and exam-related queries.
map_reference: Ground Floor, Admin Block, Zone ADM
directions: From reception, go left to the admin block. The Examination Cell is the second office on the right.

name: Principal Office
description: Office of the college principal for official approvals, institutional meetings, and senior administration.
map_reference: Ground Floor, Admin Block, Zone ADM
directions: From reception, walk towards the admin block. The Principal Office is at the end of the corridor.

name: Registrar Office
description: Handles official university records, academic registration, degree records, transcripts, and institutional documentation.
map_reference: Ground Floor, Admin Block, Zone ADM
directions: From reception, enter the admin block and walk past the accounts office. The Registrar Office is on the left.

name: Dean Academic Office
description: Office for academic policy, course approvals, academic grievances, and high-level student academic matters.
map_reference: First Floor, Admin Block, Zone ADM
directions: Take the stairs to the first floor of the admin block. The Dean Academic Office is beside the conference room.

name: Scholarship Office
description: Supports scholarship applications, fee concessions, financial aid documents, and scholarship status queries.
map_reference: Ground Floor, Admin Block, Zone ADM
directions: From reception, go to the admin block. The Scholarship Office is next to the Accounts Office.

name: International Student Office
description: Supports international students with visa guidance, accommodation support, arrival support, and documentation queries.
directions: From reception, turn left and walk past the notice boards. The International Student Office is inside Student Services.

name: Student Services Office
description: Handles student enrolment, welfare support, accommodation queries, letters, and general student help.
directions: From reception, turn left and walk past the notice boards. Student Services is the first office on the right.
events: Drop-in visa advice every Tuesday at 14:00

name: Main Cafeteria
description: Main food area serving breakfast, lunch, snacks, tea, coffee, cold drinks, and affordable student meals. Day-wise menu with approximate prices is available.
map_reference: Ground Floor, Cafeteria Block, Zone CAF
directions: From reception, turn right and walk straight past the notice board. The Main Cafeteria is on the left side of the ground floor.

menu.note: Prices are approximate student canteen prices and may change slightly.

name: Coffee Kiosk
description: Small kiosk serving coffee, tea, cold drinks, muffins, and quick snacks.
directions: From reception, walk towards the lift area. The Coffee Kiosk is next to the staircase leading to the library.

name: Outdoor Canteen Terrace
description: Outdoor seating area adjacent to the cafeteria for eating, socialising, and informal study.
opening_hours: Weather permitting. Generally Monday to Friday, 10:00–16:00.
directions: Walk through the cafeteria and exit through the glass doors at the back. The terrace is directly outside.

name: Central Library
description: Main academic library with textbooks, journals, digital resources, reading rooms, issue counter, and printing support.
map_reference: First Floor, Library Block, Zone LIB
directions: From reception, take the stairs or lift to the first floor. Turn right and walk straight. The Central Library is at the end of the corridor.
events: Research skills workshop every Wednesday at 14:00

name: Library Book Issue Counter
description: Counter for borrowing, returning, renewing books, and paying library fines.
directions: Enter the Central Library. The Book Issue Counter is directly opposite the entrance.

name: Digital Library
description: Computer-based library section for e-journals, online databases, e-books, and academic research portals.
directions: Enter the Central Library and turn right. The Digital Library is beside the reference section.

name: Reading Room
description: Silent reading space for exam preparation and individual study.
map_reference: First Floor, Library Block, Zone LIB
directions: Enter the Central Library and turn left. The Reading Room is beside the journal section.

name: Group Study Room
description: Bookable room for team assignments, group discussions, and project meetings.
directions: Inside the Central Library, walk past the reading room. Group Study Room is the glass room at the end.

name: Stationery Store
description: Campus store for notebooks, pens, lab records, drawing sheets, calculators, and academic supplies.
map_reference: Ground Floor, Near Cafeteria, Zone CAF
directions: The stationery store is next to the Main Cafeteria on the ground floor.

name: Printing and Copying Room
description: Self-service printing, scanning, and photocopying room using student ID card and campus credits.
directions: From reception, turn immediately left. The printing room is the small room next to the main entrance.

name: Medical Room
description: Basic first-aid and medical support room for students and staff.
map_reference: Ground Floor, Near Security Cabin, Zone A
directions: From the security cabin, walk towards reception. The Medical Room is on the right side before the notice board.

name: Student Counselling Room
description: Private support room for wellbeing counselling, stress management, and student mental health support.
directions: Go to Student Services. The Counselling Room is the private room at the end of the corridor.

name: Multi-Faith Prayer Room
description: Quiet non-denominational room for prayer, meditation, and reflection.
opening_hours: Open 24 hours. Access via student ID card.
directions: From student services, continue down the corridor and turn left at the fire exit sign. The prayer room is the last door on the right.

name: Boys Common Room
description: Common room for male students to relax between classes.
map_reference: Ground Floor, Student Area, Zone STU
directions: From reception, walk past the cafeteria. The Boys Common Room is beside the student lounge.

name: Girls Common Room
description: Common room for female students to relax between classes.
map_reference: Ground Floor, Student Area, Zone STU
directions: From reception, walk past the cafeteria. The Girls Common Room is next to the first aid room.

name: Ground Floor Washrooms
description: Student washrooms located on the ground floor near cafeteria and reception.
directions: From reception, walk towards the cafeteria. The washrooms are on the right side before the cafeteria entrance.

name: First Floor Washrooms
description: Student washrooms on the first floor near the library and CSE block.
directions: From the lift on the first floor, turn left. The washrooms are near the library staircase.

name: Main Lift Area
description: Main lift and staircase area connecting ground floor to all academic department floors.
map_reference: Ground Floor, Central Lobby, Zone LIFT
directions: From reception, walk straight ahead. The main lift area is beside the staircase in the central lobby.

name: Careers and Employability Office
description: Provides CV reviews, job search support, interview coaching, internship support, and networking events.
map_reference: First Floor, Admin Block, Zone CAREER
directions: From the first floor, turn right out of the lift. The Careers Office is the first door on the left, adjacent to the library.
events: Industry networking event every first Thursday at 17:00

name: Training and Placement Cell
description: Supports internships, campus placements, aptitude training, mock interviews, and company recruitment drives.
map_reference: First Floor, Admin Block, Zone PLC
directions: From reception, take the stairs to the first floor of the admin block. The Training and Placement Cell is next to the seminar hall.
events: Campus recruitment drives during placement season

name: Main Seminar Hall
description: Seminar hall used for guest lectures, workshops, technical talks, placement training, and department events.
map_reference: First Floor, Admin Block, Zone SEM
directions: Take the stairs to the first floor of the admin block. The Main Seminar Hall is opposite the placement cell.

name: Main Auditorium
description: Large hall used for annual day, orientation, conferences, cultural programmes, hackathons, and major university events.
map_reference: Ground Floor, Cultural Block, Zone AUD
directions: From reception, walk straight past the cafeteria. The Main Auditorium entrance is on the right side near the cultural block.

name: Student Union
description: Student-run social hub for clubs, events, communities, and student activities.
map_reference: Ground Floor, Student Area, Zone STU
directions: From reception, walk straight ahead past the cafeteria. The Student Union is at the far end of the ground floor.
events: New student social every first Friday at 17:00

name: Sports Ground
description: Outdoor ground used for cricket, football, athletics, sports day, and recreation.
directions: Exit through the main academic block and walk behind the mechanical workshop. The Sports Ground is beside the hostel block.

name: Campus Fitness Centre
description: Fitness room with cardio machines, free weights, and yoga space.
opening_hours: Monday to Friday, 07:00–21:00. Saturday and Sunday, 09:00–17:00.
directions: From reception, take the stairs down to the basement. The fitness centre is at the bottom of the stairs on the left.

name: Indoor Games Room
description: Recreation room with table tennis, chess, carrom, and board games.
directions: From the Student Union, turn left. The Indoor Games Room is next to the common rooms.

name: Student Parking Area
description: Parking area for bicycles, bikes, and authorised student vehicles.
directions: The student parking area is near the main gate, beside the security cabin.

name: Campus Bus Stop
description: Pick-up and drop-off point for college buses and local transport.
opening_hours: Monday to Saturday during bus schedules.
directions: Exit the main gate. The campus bus stop is on the left side outside the gate.

name: Transport Office
description: Office for bus passes, transport routes, shuttle timings, and transport fee queries.
directions: From reception, go to the admin block. The Transport Office is beside the Accounts Office.

name: Hostel Office
description: Administrative office for hostel admissions, room allocation, complaints, and accommodation support.
directions: Exit the academic block and walk towards the hostel block. The hostel office is near the hostel entrance.

name: Girls Hostel
description: Residential block for female students with rooms, study area, common room, and warden office.
directions: From the sports ground, walk towards the hostel area. Girls Hostel is the building on the right.

name: Boys Hostel
description: Residential block for male students with rooms, common area, study space, and warden office.
directions: From the sports ground, walk towards the hostel area. Boys Hostel is the building on the left.

name: ATM
description: ATM for cash withdrawal and basic banking services.
directions: The ATM is near the main gate, beside the security cabin.

name: IT Help Desk
description: Technical support for student laptops, campus Wi-Fi, student email, passwords, and software access.
directions: Take the lift to the first floor. The IT Help Desk is directly outside the Computer Lab.

name: Computer Science Engineering Department
description: Department area for Computer Science Engineering students, faculty, classrooms, labs, and academic support.
map_reference: First Floor, CSE Block, Zone CSE
directions: From reception, take the stairs or lift to the first floor. Follow the signs for the CSE Department corridor.

name: CSE Classroom 101
description: Classroom used for programming and data structures lectures.
opening_hours: Monday to Friday during scheduled classes.
directions: Go to the first floor CSE corridor. CSE Classroom 101 is located along the main department corridor.

name: CSE Classroom 102
description: Classroom used for algorithms and artificial intelligence lectures.
opening_hours: Monday to Friday during scheduled classes.
directions: Go to the first floor CSE corridor. CSE Classroom 102 is located along the main department corridor.

name: HOD Office - Computer Science Engineering
description: Office of the Head of Department for Computer Science Engineering. Students visit for academic approvals, project permissions, and departmental queries.
directions: Go to the first floor CSE corridor. The CSE HOD office is near the department classrooms and faculty rooms.

name: CSE Faculty Room
description: Faculty room for lecturers and academic staff of the Computer Science Engineering Department.
directions: Go to the first floor CSE corridor. The faculty room is beside the HOD office.

name: Information Technology Department
description: Department area for Information Technology students, faculty, classrooms, labs, and academic support.

directions: Go to the first floor IT corridor. IT Classroom 102 is located along the main department corridor.

description: Office of the Head of Department for Information Technology. Students visit for academic approvals, project permissions, and departmental queries.

Artificial Intelligence and Data Science block

name: AI&DS Classroom 201
description: Classroom used for machine learning and data mining lectures.
opening_hours: Monday to Friday during scheduled classes.
directions: Go to the second floor AI&DS corridor. AI&DS Classroom 201 is located along the main department corridor.
keywords: artificial intelligence and data science classroom

name: AI&DS Classroom 202
description: Classroom used for deep learning and big data analytics lectures.
opening_hours: Monday to Friday during scheduled classes.

artificial intelligence and data science hod

name: Computer Lab
description: High-performance workstations with Python, MATLAB, databases, and development tools.
directions: Go to the first floor CSE corridor. The Computer Lab is opposite CSE Classroom 101.

name: Networking Lab
description: Lab for computer networks, routers, switches, cybersecurity, and cloud networking practice.
directions: Go to the first floor IT corridor. The Networking Lab is beside IT Classroom 102.

name: AI and Data Science Lab
description: Lab for machine learning, deep learning, computer vision, NLP, and data analytics experiments.
directions: Go to the second floor AI block. The AI Lab is beside the AI&DS HOD Office.

name: Electronics Lab
description: Practical lab for circuits, sensors, microcontrollers, embedded systems, and communication experiments.
directions: Take the lift to the second floor. The Electronics Lab is beside the ECE HOD office.

name: Electrical Machines and Power Systems Lab
description: Electrical lab for machines, transformers, power systems, measurements, and renewable energy experiments.
directions: Go to the third floor Electrical corridor. The Electrical Lab is near EE Classroom 301.
aliases: Electrical Machines and Power Systems Lab

name: Mechanical Engineering Lab
description: Lab for mechanical experiments including materials testing, thermodynamics, and machine components.
directions: Go to the third floor Mechanical corridor. The Mechanical Lab is near the workshop staircase.

name: Civil Engineering Lab
description: Lab for concrete testing, soil testing, surveying, and structural experiments.
directions: Go to the fourth floor Civil corridor. The Civil Lab is near CE Classroom 402.

name: Chemical Engineering Lab
description: Lab for process engineering, reaction experiments, fluid flow, and chemical analysis.
directions: Go to the fourth floor Chemical Engineering corridor. The Chemical Lab is beside CHE Classroom 402.

name: Biotechnology Lab
description: Lab for microbiology, genetics, bioprocessing, and bioinformatics practical work.
directions: Go to the fifth floor Biotechnology corridor. The Biotech Lab is near the faculty room.

name: Robotics and Automation Lab
description: Lab for robotics kits, automation systems, sensors, actuators, and robot programming.
directions: Go to the fifth floor Robotics corridor. The Robotics Lab is opposite ROB Classroom 501.

name: Engineering Physics Lab
description: Lab for optics, electricity, mechanics, and first-year engineering physics experiments.
directions: From the first floor lift, turn left and walk past the classroom corridor. The Physics Lab is at the end.

name: Engineering Chemistry Lab
description: Lab for chemistry experiments, material analysis, and basic chemical testing.
directions: From the Physics Lab, continue straight. The Chemistry Lab is the next large lab on the left.

name: Engineering Workshop
description: Practical workshop for fitting, welding, carpentry, machining, and manufacturing practice.
map_reference: Ground Floor, Workshop Block, Zone WS
directions: From reception, walk to the workshop block through the side corridor. The workshop is the large hall near the mechanical lab entrance.

name: Final Year Project Lab
description: Dedicated space for final-year projects, prototypes, robotics, IoT systems, and research demonstrations.
map_reference: Third Floor, Innovation Block, Zone R
directions: Take the lift to the third floor. Turn right; the Final Year Project Lab is next to the Innovation Centre.

name: Innovation and Incubation Centre
description: Startup and innovation space for projects, entrepreneurship, hackathons, and industry collaboration.
map_reference: Third Floor, Innovation Block, Zone R
directions: Take the lift to the third floor. The Innovation Centre is directly opposite the lift.

name: CSE Department Washrooms

directions: From the CSE Department entrance, walk towards the Computer Lab. The washrooms are beside the staircase.

name: Civil Department Washrooms
description: Washrooms located beside the Civil Engineering Department corridor.
directions: From the Civil Department entrance, walk straight for 10 metres. The washrooms are on the left side of the corridor.

name: Chemical Department Washrooms
description: Washrooms located near the Chemical Engineering Department corridor.
directions: From the Chemical Engineering Department corridor, walk towards CHE Classroom 402. The washrooms are near the emergency exit.

name: Biotechnology Department Washrooms
description: Washrooms located near the Biotechnology Department corridor.
directions: From the Biotechnology Department corridor, walk past BIO Classroom 502. The washrooms are beside the lift lobby.

name: Robotics Department Washrooms
description: Washrooms located near the Robotics and Automation Department corridor.
directions: From the Robotics Department corridor, walk towards the Robotics Lab. The washrooms are opposite ROB Classroom 502.

name: Staff Parking Area
description: Reserved parking area for faculty members, lecturers, administrative staff, and authorised employees.
map_reference: Near Admin Block, Staff Parking Zone
directions: Enter through the main gate and turn left before the admin block. The staff parking area is marked for faculty and authorised staff only.

name: Visitor Parking Area
description: Short-stay parking area for visitors, parents, guest speakers, and interview candidates.
map_reference: Near Main Gate, Visitor Parking Zone
directions: The visitor parking area is just after the main gate, beside the security cabin. Visitors should register at security first.

name: Lost and Found Desk
description: Desk for reporting and collecting lost items such as ID cards, bags, keys, phones, and documents.
directions: Go to the Security Cabin near the main gate. Lost and Found is handled at the security desk.

name: Ground Floor Water Dispenser
description: Drinking water dispenser available for students and staff on the ground floor.
directions: From reception, walk towards the cafeteria. The water dispenser is beside the cafeteria entrance.

name: Library Floor Water Dispenser
description: Drinking water dispenser near the library and reading room area.
directions: Go to the first floor library area. The water dispenser is near the reading room entrance.

name: Student Device Charging Station
description: Charging station with plug points for laptops and mobile phones.
directions: From the library entrance, walk towards the open study area. The charging station is beside the group study tables.

name: Ground Floor Emergency Exit
description: Emergency exit route from the ground floor academic and cafeteria areas.
directions: From the cafeteria corridor, follow the green emergency exit signs towards the side gate.

name: Admin Conference Room
description: Conference room used for university meetings, interviews, guest meetings, and administrative discussions.
directions: Take the stairs to the first floor of the admin block. The conference room is opposite the Dean Academic Office.

name: Research and Development Cell
description: Supports student and faculty research, project proposals, publications, innovation grants, and research mentoring.
directions: Take the lift to the third floor. The Research and Development Cell is beside the Innovation Centre.
events: Research proposal clinic every Wednesday at 15:00

name: Hostel Mess
description: Dining facility for hostel students serving breakfast, lunch, evening snacks, and dinner.
directions: From the hostel office, walk straight towards the common courtyard. The hostel mess is on the left.

name: Hostel Laundry Room
description: Laundry room for hostel residents with washing machines and drying area.
directions: Enter the hostel block and turn right near the common room. The laundry room is at the end of the corridor.
